subject: [PATCH v2 1/7] mm: list_lru: lock_list_lru_of_memcg() cannot return NULL if !skip_empty

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with a Reviewed-by tag, indicating that it meets kernel coding standards and is ready for merge.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch removes unnecessary NULL checks in the list_lru_add and list_lru_del functions, as acquiring the lock for these operations will not fail.
